{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Black Dragon Prisoner
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|One contestant is listed as '[[Black Dragon Prisoner]]'.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Black Dragon Prisoner]] is the one remaining member of the black [[dragon]] team.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
